message:
fix: Propagate errors instead of silently swallowing them

Fix several codegen functions that were using `catch {}` to silently
ignore errors, which could lead to malformed code generation:

- expressions.zig: Convert lambda NotAClosure to UnsupportedSyntax
- mod_helper.zig: Propagate emitBlockBreak errors
- statements/misc.zig: Propagate hoistWithBodyVarsSkipping errors
- collections_mod.zig: Propagate emitUniqueBlockStart and emitBlockBreak errors
- async_state_machine.zig: Propagate frame_fields.append errors

These changes ensure codegen failures are properly reported instead of
producing incomplete or broken Zig code.
